name: AWS Activate Founders
public_description: Up to $100K in AWS Promotional Credit for AI/ML and Web3 startups.
locked_instructions:
1. Go to aws.amazon.com/activate.
2. Apply for the Portfolio tier.
3. Use our partner Org ID: FUSH-AWS-2026.
4. Ensure your cap table reflects your recent funding.

name: Notion for Startups
public_description: Up to 6 months free of Notion Plus, including unlimited AI.
locked_instructions:
1. Go to notion.so/startups.
2. Click 'Apply Now'.
3. Select 'Partner' in the dropdown.
4. Enter partner code: FUSH-NOTION-2026.

name: GCP Startups Scale Tier
public_description: Up to $350K USD in Google Cloud credits for scaling startups.
locked_instructions:
1. Visit cloud.google.com/startup.
2. Apply for the 'Scale Tier'.
3. You must upload your official Seed/Series A term sheet or accelerator acceptance letter.

name: Stripe Fee Waiver
public_description: $50,000 in fee-free processing to help you get off the ground.
locked_instructions:
1. Create a Stripe account.
2. Navigate to Settings > Business settings > Programs.
3. Enter the waiver code: STRIPE-FUSH-50K.
